pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require the routine name 'Smolov Jr. Bench'.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require exactly 4 days to be added to the routine.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require these 4 set/rep configuration mappings for each day.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is generative and synthetic, requiring the agent to create a new Wger powerlifting routine from scratch without external datasets. Explicitly verified the expected routine name ('Smolov Jr. Bench'), the target days count (4), and the four sets/reps configurations (6x6, 7x5, 8x4, 10x3) directly against the prompt instructions and verifier.py scoring logic.
